stopped_at: Phase 3 directory created, /gsd-plan-phase 3 interrupted before researcher or planner ran

blocking_constraints.title: feed-orchestrator requires both --profile platform and --profile feeds
blocking_constraints.detail: feed-orchestrator depends_on opencti which has profiles:[platform]. Any docker compose command for feed-orchestrator must use: docker compose --profile platform --profile feeds <cmd>. Using only --profile feeds gives 'no such service: opencti' error.

blocking_constraints.title: pycti 6.4.x externalReferences expects ID strings not dicts
blocking_constraints.detail: client.indicator.create(externalReferences=[{'source_name':'X'}]) fails with VALIDATION_ERROR. pycti expects a list of pre-created external reference IDs. Removed from opencti_client.py for Phase 2 scope.

blocking_constraints.title: URLhaus CSV has no non-comment header row
blocking_constraints.detail: csv_recent/ response has all header info in # comment lines. DictReader must be given explicit fieldnames or it uses the first data row as header and returns 0 indicators.

background_processes.name: feed-orchestrator
background_processes.command: docker compose --profile platform --profile feeds ps feed-orchestrator
background_processes.note: URLhaus scheduled to re-run every 1h; Feodo every 4h; OTX every 6h

session_summary.phase_2_uat: COMPLETE — 14/14 tests passed (commit 5308547). Cold start, URLhaus+Feodo IOCs in OpenCTI, confidence Score=45 verified, dedup key prefix correct, pytest 25/25, BaseFeed importable.
session_summary.phase_2_status: Phase 2 fully complete — all 8 plans executed + UAT passed
session_summary.phase_3_status: Directory created (.planning/phases/03-ai-ioc-extraction/), no research or plans yet

phase_3_context.goal: An analyst can submit a PDF file or a URL to the intel-extractor service and receive extracted IOCs — mapped to MITRE ATT&CK techniques where mentioned — inserted into OpenCTI as STIX objects, processed entirely by the local LLM.
key_constraints: GPU VRAM: 4GB — only one large model active at a time
No external API calls — all LLM processing must remain local via Ollama
Local LLM: llama3.2:3b (already pulled via init-models.sh in Phase 1)

integration_notes.disabled_reason: MALWAREBAZAAR_AUTH_KEY and THREATFOX_AUTH_KEY not set in .env
